name: apple-calendar
description: Read events from macOS Calendar (Apple Calendar). Supports all calendar sources — iCloud, Google, Exchange, subscribed calendars, etc. List calendars, view events for today/tomorrow/specific dates, query date ranges, and search by title, notes, or location. Read-only — no event creation or modification. Requires macOS and Calendar access permission.
commands: events date <yyyy-MM-dd>                               — Events on a specific date
events range <yyyy-MM-dd> <yyyy-MM-dd>                 — Events in a date range (inclusive)
events search <query> [--from <date>] [--to <date>]    — Search events by title/notes/location

binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the compiled calendar-cli binary. If omitted, the tool compiles it automatically from the bundled Swift source on first use.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each calendar-cli invocation. Default: 10.

allowedCommands.description: Whitelist of allowed command paths. If set, only these commands are permitted. Omit to allow all. Prefix matching: 'events' covers all events subcommands.

deniedCommands.description: Blacklist of command paths. Always blocked, even if in allowedCommands. Deny beats allow.
